queries.sql:
select `orders`.`id`, `orders`.`increment_id`, `orders`.`base_grand_total`, `orders`.`created_at`, `orders`.`channel_name`, `orders`.`channel_id`, `orders`.`status`, `orders`.`seller_approval_status`, `seller`.`name` as `seller_name`, `seller`.`email` as `seller_email`, `seller`.`seller_level` as `seller_level`, (SELECT sa.shop_name FROM seller_applications sa WHERE sa.seller_id = orders.seller_id ORDER BY sa.id DESC LIMIT 1) as seller_shop_name, `orders`.`customer_email`, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL), 0) as items_count, GROUP_CONCAT(order_payment.method SEPARATOR "|") as method, CONCAT(orders.customer_first_name, " ", orders.customer_last_name) as full_name, CONCAT(order_address_billing.city, ", ", order_address_billing.state,", ", order_address_billing.country) as location, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(oi.base_total * COALESCE(ssp.commission_percent, 0) / 100, 2)), 0)
                    FROM order_items oi
                    LEFT JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id AND ssp.product_id = oi.product_id
                    WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as commission_total, (SELECT pi.path
                    FROM order_items oi
                    LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON pi.product_id = oi.product_id
                    WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL
                    ORDER BY oi.id ASC, pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC
                    LIMIT 1) as first_image_path from `orders` left join `seller` on `orders`.`seller_id` = `seller`.`id` left join `addresses` as `order_address_shipping` on `order_address_shipping`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_shipping`.`address_type` = 'order_shipping' left join `addresses` as `order_address_billing` on `order_address_billing`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_billing`.`address_type` = 'order_billing' left join `order_payment` on `orders`.`id` = `order_payment`.`order_id` where `orders`.`seller_id` is not null and `seller`.`id` is not null group by `orders`.`id` order by `orders`.`created_at` desc

statements.sql: select exists (select 1 from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'tikkkshops' and table_name = 'seller_applications' and table_type in ('BASE TABLE', 'SYSTEM VERSIONED')) as `exists`

select `orders`.`id`, `orders`.`increment_id`, `orders`.`base_grand_total`, `orders`.`created_at`, `orders`.`channel_name`, `orders`.`channel_id`, `orders`.`status`, `orders`.`seller_approval_status`, `seller`.`name` as `seller_name`, `seller`.`email` as `seller_email`, `seller`.`seller_level` as `seller_level`, (SELECT sa.shop_name FROM seller_applications sa WHERE sa.seller_id = orders.seller_id ORDER BY sa.id DESC LIMIT 1) as seller_shop_name, `orders`.`customer_email`, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL), 0) as items_count, GROUP_CONCAT(order_payment.method SEPARATOR "|") as method, CONCAT(orders.customer_first_name, " ", orders.customer_last_name) as full_name, CONCAT(order_address_billing.city, ", ", order_address_billing.state,", ", order_address_billing.country) as location, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(oi.base_total * COALESCE(ssp.commission_percent, 0) / 100, 2)), 0)
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id AND ssp.product_id = oi.product_id
WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as commission_total, (SELECT pi.path
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON pi.product_id = oi.product_id
WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY oi.id ASC, pi.position ASC, pi.id ASC
LIMIT 1) as first_image_path from `orders` left join `seller` on `orders`.`seller_id` = `seller`.`id` left join `addresses` as `order_address_shipping` on `order_address_shipping`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_shipping`.`address_type` = 'order_shipping' left join `addresses` as `order_address_billing` on `order_address_billing`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_billing`.`address_type` = 'order_billing' left join `order_payment` on `orders`.`id` = `order_payment`.`order_id` where `orders`.`seller_id` is not null and `seller`.`id` is not null group by `orders`.`id` order by `orders`.`created_at` desc
